---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to be able to do?**
Describe the workflow or capability you have in mind.

**Why is it useful?**
What problem does it solve, and who benefits?

**Possible approach**
If you have a sense of how it might work, sketch it here. An API or function
shape is welcome but not required.
